name_it: Saint Augustine Zhao Rong and companions, martyrs
name_en: Saint Augustine Zhao Rong and companions, martyrs
name_es: Saint Augustine Zhao Rong and companions, martyrs
name_pt: Saint Augustine Zhao Rong and companions, martyrs
bio_en: Augustine Zhao Rong was a Chinese Catholic priest who was martyred in 1815. He was canonized by Pope John Paul II on October 1, 2000, as one of the 120 Martyrs of China.
bio_it: Augustine Zhao Rong was a Chinese Catholic priest who was martyred in 1815. He was canonized by Pope John Paul II on October 1, 2000, as one of the 120 Martyrs of China.

bio_pt: Augustine Zhao Rong was a Chinese Catholic priest who was martyred in 1815. He was canonized by Pope John Paul II on October 1, 2000, as one of the 120 Martyrs of China.
